title: piper foliosum
intro: Piper foliosum, also known as the Philippine pepper or Pili pepper, is a type of flowering plant in the pepper family (Piperaceae) native to the Philippines. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Piper foliosum include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Piper foliosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a spice.
